title: Ubiquiti UniFi UPS Tower
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi UPS is a backup power supply unit designed for network devices, ensuring their operation during a power outage. The device features a tower-type design and includes 10 power sockets for connecting equipment. Of these, 5 sockets (C13) provide surge protection, while the remaining 5 sockets (C13) offer combined protection âboth surge and power outage protection . Continuous power is ensured by a hot-swap replaceable battery , which allows battery replacement while the unit… The device is equipped with a Power button and a Factory Reset button, and features (2) LED indicators . (1) LED displays the status of the device itself , while the other indicates the battery status . At full load , the backup power supply can power connected devices for approximately 2 minutes. At half load , the runtime extends to about 7 minutes . Charging the battery to 90 % capacity takes approximately 6 to 8 hours .
